title: schedonorus pulchellus
intro: Schedonorus pulchellus, also known as hair grass or green wood grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Schedonorus pulchellus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of Schedonorus pulchellus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
